items.title: The New York Knicks' margins of victory in the Eastern Conference Finals:
items.author: Justin Kubatko
items.body_excerpt:
The New York Knicks' margins of victory in the Eastern Conference Finals:

✅ +11 PTS
✅ +16 PTS
✅ +13 PTS
✅ +37 PTS

They are the first team in NBA conference or division finals history to record four double-digit wins in a series sweep.

Read, share, subscribe ⬇️

items.title: For the first time ever, a Filipino American player will win an NBA Championship
items.author: NBA Stat
items.body_excerpt:
For the first time ever, a Filipino American player will win an NBA Championship

With Knicks now in NBA Finals & Thunder vs Spurs locked at 2-2, we’re sure that 1 of these Filipino Americans will win a ring:
> Jordan Clarkson, Knicks
> Jared McCain, Thunder
> Dylan Harper, Spurs

(via JBond)
#NBA

items.title: The Knicks have four 30-point wins in the 2026 NBA Playoffs, tying the 2025 Thunder for the most such wins in a single postseason.
items.author: Justin Kubatko
items.body_excerpt:
The Knicks have four 30-point wins in the 2026 NBA Playoffs, tying the 2025 Thunder for the most such wins in a single postseason.

They are the first team to record three series-clinching wins by 30 or more points in a single postseason.
